body: Suspecting we need a write batch — every refresh kicks a SET. Let me try an N=8 batch on the dual-writer.
Agree. Once the batch lands let's re-run the load test from baseline.
Looks great — couple of nits inline. Approving once the metric in #143 lands.
Marked draft until we wire the gRPC retry config (blocked by #89).
Repro steps in the linked Loom. Logs attached.
